title: Lucky's Palette
description: A mod that adds new blocks into the game
body:
![1](https://i.imgur.com/jv06Km9.png)
![LuckyOwl's other projects](https://i.imgur.com/kOjhLnp.png)
![Join the Discord!](https://i.imgur.com/DYcSpN3.png)

### **Blocks**

- Planked Walls - Connecting wood block textures, great for walls
- Timberplates - A new design for wood blocks.
- Beams - Connectable beams that add huge possibilities to enhance your builds.
- Lattices - Stackable pole like blocks that serve many building applications.
- Frames - Decoration blocks to expand on existing blocks.
- Stairs and Slabs for existing minecraft blocks.
